## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run build` if the change affects release artifacts, app bundles, or the landing page

## Notes

- Security-sensitive changes update `SECURITY.md` or the README security model when needed.
- User-facing changes update README, landing copy, or release notes when needed.
